specific_question: Are Elexion Sales Representatives available to answer live calls from customers at any time?
answer: No, per Sales Department Policy, Sales Department phone lines are staffed with live representatives from 8 a.m. CDT to 8 p.m. CDT, on all days of the week. Outside of these times, customers are directed to an automated voice messaging system where they can leave a message and a Sales Representative will contact them within 24 hours.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
